2604.18206.title: A Control Architecture for Training-Free Memory Use
2604.18206.paper_summary: Prompt-injected memory can improve reasoning without updating model weights, but it also creates a control problem: retrieved content helps only when it is applied in the right state. We study this problem in a strict training-free setting and formulate it as applicability control: when to trigger a memory-assisted second pass, when to trust it, and how to maintain the memory bank over time. Our method combines uncertainty-based routing, confidence-based selective acceptance, bank selection across rule and exemplar memory, and evidence-based governance of the memory bank over time. Under a locked training-free protocol with compute-matched controls, it improves two core arithmetic benchmarks by +7.0 points on SVAMP and +7.67 points on ASDiv over baseline. The same architecture also transfers to QA and agent benchmarks with smaller positive effects and shows the same positive direction on a second checkpoint for the main arithmetic tasks. On arithmetic, the main empirical pattern is that the control architecture, rather than raw memory exposure, drives the improvements on SVAMP and ASDiv. Mechanistically, confidence separates helpful from harmful rule-bank interventions, and under fixed retrieval the repair-versus-corrupt difference localizes to rows whose retrieved set actually contains the edited entries.
2604.18206.paper_summary_zh: 提示注入記憶可以在不更新模型權重的情況下改善推理，但它也創造了一個控制問題：檢索的內容只有在以正確狀態應用時才有幫助。我們在一個嚴格的無訓練設置中研究這個問題，並將其表述為適用性控制：何時觸發記憶輔助的第二次通過，何時信任它，以及如何隨時間維護記憶庫。我們的方法結合了基於不確定性的路由、基於信心的選擇性接受、跨規則和範例記憶的庫選擇，以及隨時間變化的基於證據的記憶庫治理。在一個鎖定的無訓練協議下，並與計算匹配的控制進行比較，它在SVAMP上提高了+7.0分，在ASDiv上提高了+7.67分，超過基準。相同的架構也轉移到QA和代理基準，帶來較小的正面影響，並在主要算術任務的第二個檢查點上顯示出相同的正向趨勢。在算術方面，主要的實證模式是控制架構，而不是原始記憶暴露，驅動了SVAMP和ASDiv的改進。在機制上，信心將有益的與有害的規則庫干預區分開來，而在固定檢索下，修復與損壞的差異定位於其檢索集實際包含編輯條目的行。
2604.18206.author: Yanzhen Lu et.al.
2604.18206.authors: Yanzhen Lu, Muchen Jiang, Zhicheng Qian, Xingyu Zhou
